name: agent-arcade
description: Agent Arcade — stress-relief retro platformer overlay to use while your AI agent is working

scripts.build:frontend: rm -rf dist/game dist/assets && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && cp src/game/index.html dist/game/ && cp node_modules/phaser/dist/phaser.min.js dist/game/ && cp -R assets dist/assets
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && cd src-tauri && cargo build
scripts.start: npm run build:frontend && cd src-tauri && cargo tauri dev

author: Dan Wahlin
